name: Success Holders, Inc.
summary: Success Holders, Inc. engages in the technology and media business in Japan. The company publishes Pado, a community-based free paper; Luccica, a lifestyle magazine for women; and LucciaWeb, a monthly Web magazine. It also develops and maintains systems and IT products; and offers infrastructure construction services, such as networks and servers. The company was formerly known as Pado Corporation and changed its name to Success Holders, Inc. in October 2020. Success Holders, Inc. was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
